title: World of Daldar
description: A Medieval Fantasy MMO Modpack as seen in the video "Minecraft Players Simulate a MMO on Hardcore Minecraft" by ForgeLabs
body:
# World of Daldar by ForgeLabs ![Forge Labs Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f83f327701a64468e9152ecf2450c0ef1be54a3f.png)
In this mod pack, you find yourself in a Medieval Fantasy world waiting to be explored. As you play, you'll progress various skillsets and unlock new perks to play around with. This Hardcore Survival Modpack is focused on exploration, combat, and progression. Do you have what it takes to set foot in the World of Daldar?
![Forge Labs Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f83f327701a64468e9152ecf2450c0ef1be54a3f.png) ![Forge Labs Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f83f327701a64468e9152ecf2450c0ef1be54a3f.png)
### Notice Shaders and Resource Packs are supported out of the box. Go to Options > Video Settings > Shaderpacks and choose a shader to use.
![Forge Labs Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f83f327701a64468e9152ecf2450c0ef1be54a3f.png)
### Socials


![Forge Labs Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f83f327701a64468e9152ecf2450c0ef1be54a3f.png)
